summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kelika multi-tenant SaaS MVP. Found critical backend authorization issues preventing core functionality testing. Frontend authentication and basic navigation work correctly.

critical_bugs.issue: Super admin cannot create venues - authorization check only allows 'tenant_admin' or 'staff' roles
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks entire venue management workflow and dependent features (courts, bookings, pricing)

critical_bugs.issue: Cannot test court creation due to venue creation failure
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks court management and booking functionality

critical_bugs.issue: Cannot test pricing rules due to missing court_id
Cannot test booking creation due to missing court_id

design_issues.details: Super admin has tenant_id: null but venue creation requires user.tenant_id

ui_bugs.issue: Create tenant button click handler not implemented - no modal/form opens
Create venue button click handler not implemented - no modal/form opens

integration_issues.issue: Console shows 401 errors from failed API calls

success_percentage.backend: 67% (12/18 tests passed - limited by authorization issues)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix backend authorization logic in server.py lines 440-441 to allow super_admin role to create venues. Also implement frontend modal/form components for tenant and venue creation. The authorization bug blocks testing of 50% of core functionality including venues, courts, bookings, and pricing rules.
